zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：弱势震荡偏空整理
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD整体处于弱势震荡格局，价格小幅反弹至6.30附近，但仍受均线压制，短线趋势偏弱，缺乏明确上行动能，整体结构仍以整理下行为主。

技术指标方面，MACD维持负值并未出现明显金叉，动能仍偏空。价格运行在20日均线6.6455下方，说明中期趋势仍受空头压制，反弹更多属于修正行情而非反转。

支撑位关注6.23一线前低区域，若跌破可能进一步下探至6.20附近寻求支撑；上方阻力在6.33短期高点，若无法突破则反弹空间受限，强阻力集中在6.65均线附近。

交易策略建议以区间震荡思路应对，靠近6.33区域可考虑分批减仓或短线试空，回落至6.23支撑附近可轻仓博反弹，同时需严格设置止损以应对假突破风险。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently trading around 6.3086, showing a modest intraday rebound of 0.97%, but the broader structure remains weak. Price action is still positioned below the 20-day SMA at 6.64552, indicating that recent upside attempts have not yet reclaimed the short-term trend. The market is effectively in a corrective phase following prior downside pressure, with price compressing into a narrow intraday range between 6.2318 and 6.3301.

Momentum indicators continue to lean bearish, with MACD printing -0.10313170, signaling persistent downside pressure despite minor short-term stabilization. The absence of RSI data limits precision, but price behavior below the SMA suggests momentum has not yet shifted to bullish. Overall, trend strength remains subdued, and rallies are currently more corrective than impulsive, with sellers still dominating any attempts to break higher.

Key support is emerging near 6.23, aligning with the recent intraday low, and a sustained break below this zone could expose further downside toward psychological levels near 6.20. On the upside, immediate resistance sits at 6.33, followed by stronger resistance at the 20-day SMA around 6.65. This structure creates a clearly defined range where rejection at resistance continues to favor sellers unless momentum improves.

From a trading perspective, conditions favor cautious positioning. Counter-trend longs should only be considered on confirmed reclaim of 6.33 with improving momentum confirmation, while failure to hold 6.23 may accelerate downside pressure. Short-term traders may prefer range strategies between support and resistance, but breakout confirmation is essential before committing to directional trades. Risk management remains critical given the compressed volatility environment.
